Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent some time working[n]with the student council.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The hours flew by as I[n]worked hard on my tasks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I don't see Odagiri. Is he absent today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Um, no... I'm pretty sure he came to school today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Ah, so this is what Fushimi was telling me about... I see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Well, his intentions are good, so you can't really blame him. But I understand how you feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...Ah, you're all free to leave now. Good work today.[n]{f 1 1}
